title: 3 Habits That Keep You Broke

segments.text: Three quiet habits keep most people broke for life.
And the last one feels completely normal.
Spending to impress people you don't even like.
Buying things that lose value the second you own them.
And never paying yourself first when money comes in.
Follow for the money mindset they don't teach you.

description: Three normal-feeling habits that quietly keep you broke. Follow for daily money wisdom!
